user.title: Apavital — sign in
user.description: Enter your My Apavital credentials. You'll then receive a one-time code by SMS or e-mail to confirm.

method.title: Where should we send the code?
method.description: Choose how to receive your one-time login code.

otp.title: Enter the code
otp.description: Enter the one-time code you just received.

reauth_confirm.title: Apavital — sign in again
reauth_confirm.description: Your Apavital login expired. Enter your credentials again; you'll confirm with a one-time code.

error.invalid_code: That one-time code was incorrect or expired. Try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Apavital. Check your connection and try again.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Apavital account is already configured.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: Please sign in with the same Apavital account you configured originally.
